body: Adding that I need them shipped to the BCDSS training room by September 25 if possible.
Thanks Ryan, standard lead time is 10 business days. I will confirm the quote shortly.
Confirmed the duplicated paragraph. We will correct it in the next print run.
We can do 10 percent off at 50+ combined copies. Send both trainer details to set it up.
I can mail back the four defective copies or send photos, whichever is easier.
Photos are fine. Replacements will ship with your fall order at no charge.
